channel.title: gracie_ridez TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from gracie_ridez

item.title: To be fair, I STILL don’t have my license😭 #fy #bikesoftiktok #yamaha

item.title: Yeah my parents weren’t exactly thrilled when I told them I bought a motorcycle from Facebook marketplace. #yamaha #sportbikes #viraltiktok #biketiktoker

item.title: It’s great from far, but far from great😭 BUT WE DID IT! #wrap #pink #r3 #yamaha #2015 #viralvideo

item.title: I respect. I kinda wonder what would’ve happened if I gave it more than a baby rev😭 #fyp #motorcycle #r3 #yamaha #bikegirlsoftiktok

item.title: IB:@MVB.Stellaaaa if you think about it, my bike is slow compared to an r7, but an r7 is slow to an r6, and an r6 is slow to an r1. #bikeisbike #r3 #fyp #bikegirl #viral
item.description: IB:@MVB.Stellaaaa if you think about it, my bike is slow compared to an r7, but an r7 is slow to an r6, and an r6 is slow to an r1. #bikeisbike #r3 #fyp #bikegirl #viral

item.title: Recall for 24-25 zx6r models.. Told them to “not ride”😭 hopefully they fix it soon. #kawasaki #fyp #motorcycle #sportbikes #viraltoktok

item.title: I was too scared. I know he’d only get me back worse so I chose peace. Just had to let him know if I wanted to, I could🤭 #motorcycle #biketok #bikers #bikergirl #sportbike
